normalizedCompany.name: The Human Ai Institute
normalizedCompany.description:
Welcome to the Human-Ai.Institute - a "Think & Do Tank" bridging Human and AI development, specifically but not exclusively international policy development - predominantly within the UN system.

This purpose of this group is to gather & exchange knowledge, insight, ideas & challenges in the Human-centric Ai (Artificial intelligence) space. 

Some of this will ultimately serve to inform & pro-actively shape global policies, where necessary, Regulation by addressing Human rights & Fundamental rights issues that are impacted by emerging Artificial intelligence, Neurotechnology and Robotics technologies.

We are coming from an ethics & value-driven perspective and are looking at developing Human-centric Ai governance frameworks.

The Human AI Institute is a proud founding member of the United Nations University  AI Network (UNU AI Network):
https://aimacau-2024.org/UNU-AI-Network-Member/

normalizedCompany.name: Multiples.vc
normalizedCompany.description:
Multiples is a valuation data platform, built for VCs, PEs and other financial services professionals.

Our mission is to deliver institutional-quality valuation multiples, through a modern UI, at a fraction of the cost of major data providers, like Pitchbook or S&P Capital IQ.

With Multiples you can benchmark public comps based on analyst estimates and verified M&A multiples across 220+ granular tech-first categories, e.g. automotive software, DevOps or defense tech.

Access forward-looking multiples such as EV/2026E EBITDA, historical metrics like EV/LTM Revenue, tech-specific benchmarks like rule of 40 and so much more.

For power users, we're happy to offer a white-label API solution, contact us at hi@multiples.vc to learn more!

normalizedCompany.description:
AIEntertainment(tm) showcases AI Artist,  the AI programs used, means to use them in current AI-related arts, workflow, articles, and comments from AI repost . Plus the showcase allows companies and people to find an AI artist for needed AI work.

Additionally, we are introducing the opportunity for you to own your own blockchain domain name under the "dot"AIEntertainment TLD. This is a gateway to your blockchain presence, allowing you to secure a unique domain name for your creations. By using your chosen name followed by .AIEntertainment, you can establish your presence in the future of entertainment, and using Blockchain for creation dates, to much more.

We are offering the new WW3 blockchain, which revolutionizes online connectivity. Similar to .com or .io, the .AIEntertainment TLD represents a new era. Imagine having a domain name like "yourart.AIEntertainment" to showcase your name, product, or art. Unlike the old .com system, AIEntertainment lives on the WW3 blockchain.

While the TLD will soon go live, you can reserve your spot now for the upcoming web3/blockchain domain activation. From "bobsmith.aientertainment" to "worldsbest.aientertainment," various domain names are available for purchase. Even prominent players like Disney might be interested in buying a name from you, should you choose to resell a domain you own. Once you acquire a domain under AIEntertainment, it's yours to keep or sell. Notably, Voice.com sold for $30MM, highlighting the value of these domains.

Having your own blockchain domain simplifies crypto transactions by using one name/number for all your crypto dealings instead of relying on individual cryptocurrency addresses. This advancement will gain further significance as it matures.

There is only one fee for life, not like ww2s yearly fees, plus you own it. 
As AI tools mature, we will be implementing the main goals to become a hub for public AI entertainment from AI artists around the world.
https://tinyurl.com/aientertainment

Well, you may be surprised to know that we did not start as Marketers. Nor did we start as Copywriters or Graphic Designers.

Who we are, fundamentally, is a team of independent Fintech and Payment Strategists, drawing upon years of direct and first-hand industry experience across tech, product, commercial, and strategic functions within the payments space. With a creative flair for simplifying the complex, we deliver fresh, unique, and actionable insights uniquely blended into core payment executiton helping our clients optimise their strategies.

With clients interests first in mind, Paypr-work brings distinctive core payments expertise through a modular service around 3 pillars:

1Fintech & Payments Consulting and Advisory - Supporting merchants in enhancing their payment propositions, implementing the right solutions, and driving growth as fractional integrated resources or strategic advisors.

2Fintech Positioning, GTM & Thought Leadership - Helping fintechs, acquirers, issuers and PSPs build a strong market presence through strategic positioning, assets production and industry engagement.

3Masterclasses and Payment Innovation workshops - Designing and delivering tailored training sessions. 

Paypr.work business model is built organically, and as such, we also work with an extended trusted network of partners, independent strategists, advisors and consultants across many verticals and value-added services. 

Over the last few years, we have been fortunate enough to work with leading Fintech, PSPs, ambitious startups and merchants. Some of the projects we worked on include Shift4, Checkout, Visa, Iberojet, Mastercard, Guestline etc..

Visit our Services: https://paypr.work/services/
About Us: https://paypr.work/about-us/
Our Blog: https://paypr.work/blog/

Schedule Time with us:

Our proprietary AI architecture, combines neuroscience with teaching theory to create truly adaptive learning experiences. Unlike traditional one-size-fits-all approaches, our AI tutor learns and evolves with each student, adapting to their knowledge gaps in their curriculum delivering personalised education at scale. We're a small, extremely mission driven company that is growing fast and is backed by Innovate UK, impact focused venture capital and both Microsoft and Google's Startup programmes.

normalizedCompany.description:
AI for Global Goals is an EdTech organisation advancing AI education through world-class programmes, practical learning experiences, and innovative technology. We serve students, researchers, professionals, and organisations seeking strong, applied capability in machine learning, deep learning, and generative AI.

Our flagship programme, the Oxford Machine Learning School (OxML), brings together leading researchers, industry experts, and a global cohort of learners for rigorous, high-level AI education. OxML has supported thousands of alumni across academia, industry, and entrepreneurship.

We also developed Elandi, our AI-powered learning platform for personalised assessment, tailored learning pathways, and scalable upskilling programmes. Elandi helps individuals and organisations identify skill gaps, build capability, and progress with confidence.

Through OxML, Elandi, and our broader education initiatives, AI for Global Goals is working to expand access to high-quality AI learning and strengthen global AI talent.

The agency uses state-of-the-art artificial intelligence technologies, such as machine learning, natural language processing, and predictive analytics, to craft highly effective and data-driven marketing solutions tailored to the unique needs of each client.

At Runrex, the mission is to optimize every aspect of a business's marketing strategy. By analyzing vast amounts of consumer data, the agency identifies trends, behaviors, and preferences, which helps businesses create targeted campaigns that speak directly to their audience. Runrex’s AI-powered tools also enable real-time adjustments and improvements, ensuring that each marketing initiative is continuously optimized for better performance and increased ROI.

The agency’s services span a wide range of digital marketing channels, including search engine optimization (SEO), social media marketing, email marketing, content creation, and paid advertising. Runrex excels at automating processes that would otherwise be time-consuming and labor-intensive, such as content generation, audience segmentation, and A/B testing, allowing businesses to focus on what truly matters – building strong relationships with their customers.

Runrex is also at the forefront of innovation when it comes to personalized marketing. Using advanced AI algorithms, the agency customizes messaging, content, and advertisements for individual consumers, ensuring that each interaction feels person

normalizedCompany.name: AI for Non-Techies
normalizedCompany.description:
We help teams become Copilot confident. 

We provide role-specific Copilot training for teams who want more than passive adoption. Our training takes every employee - the enthusiastic early adopters and the cautious sceptics - and builds the practical confidence to use Copilot as a genuine work tool, not an experiment. Every session is live, interactive, and built around real tasks your team does every day. 

We're offering a range of role-specific courses for:

- Financial Advisors
- Legal Fee Earners
- Medical Affairs
- Pharma Commercial
- HR Teams
- Marketing and Commercial
- Insurance Professionals
- Professional Services Support
- Consultants & Analysts
- UK Public Sector 


At AI for Non-Techies, we make AI accessible and practical to everyone (without the jargon). AI has been around for decades, but this is the first time we, non-techie people, have been able to use it: to instruct, create, even build our own tools - all without a single snippet of code. 

We offer AI training for teams, leaders and individuals in a range of ways: 

- Team training - our talented team can train your team, online or in-person
- Become an AI Trainer - an on-demand, in-depth course to help you join the lucrative and exciting world of AI training.
- The new, FREE AI Literacy course - accessible and available to everyone with Certification, free webinars and masterclasses.

Get in touch to find out more.

normalizedCompany.name: Tech On Toast
normalizedCompany.description:
Built by people who've actually run hospitality businesses, Tech On Toast exists to fix the way the industry buys and manages technology.

Most operators are overwhelmed by choice, undersupported after purchase, and paying too much for tools their teams don't use. We change that.

We connect hospitality operators to the right technology through an independent marketplace of 100+ vetted partners, a community of 8,000+ operators and tech leaders, and hands-on consultancy that starts with your operation, not a sales pitch.

What we do:

→ Community & Events — The UK's largest independent network of hospitality operators and tech leaders. Peer-to-peer insight, not vendor noise.
→ Marketplace — A curated directory of 100+ hospitality tech partners across POS, workforce, payments, reservations, delivery, and more. Free to access, with exclusive pricing for members.
→ Consultancy — Tech stack audits, procurement support, and vendor selection for hotels, restaurants, QSR, pubs, and leisure operators.
→ Stacked Recruitment — Connecting hospitality businesses with tech-savvy talent, and tech companies with people who understand operations.
→ Retained Partnerships — Strategic advisory for tech vendors looking to grow in hospitality. Persona workshops, go-to-market support, and case studies.
→ Podcast — 200+ episodes of honest conversation with the operators and founders shaping hospitality tech. No scripts, no sponsorship reads, just real talk.

Why operators trust us

We're not a tech company pretending to understand hospitality. Our founder ran venues for 15 years (Carluccio's, Pieminister, Hard Rock, Virgin Active) before building Tech On Toast. That operational background shapes everything we do. We recommend what works, not what pays us the most.
 techontoast.community
 Listen to the podcast:https://open.spotify.com/show/4KPfPAVUZexBKheK5WHjxz?si=894a52bc5e104a13

normalizedCompany.name: Image Protect
normalizedCompany.description:
Image Protect is the fastest growing community of visual artists focused on content protection and monetization. By combining advanced image search technology, digital image recognition, and a secure shareable online image format, IPShareTM, with a growing platform of over 450,000 members, Image Protect is at the forefront for the protection and monetization of global copyright. 

Image Protect is a revolutionary content rights platform, utilizing blockchain technology to manage, protect and monetize digital media for content producers of all levels, publishers, and advertisers. Our embeddable in-image advertising format, IPShareTM, lies at the heart of our mission. 

As an option to the Standard DMCA Takedown notice, Image Protect has developed the IPShareTM technology - an interactive online image format with in-image advertising, hot links, social sharing and dynamic messaging. This image format makes it impossible to steal the image by either downloading or screenshot/screen printing. This new model allows us to sell in-image advertising, which we share a portion of the proceeds to the creator and the publisher. The model works similar to the DMCA Takedown notice, but instead of requesting a removal of the content, we ask to replace the image with our proprietary embed code image. It is a win-win for all parties!

normalizedCompany.name: Julian Jewel's AI Bot
normalizedCompany.description:
JJAIBOT is a non-governmental, nonprofit private foundation. We do not solicit funds from the public. The mission of JJAIBOT is to promotes awareness towards environment protection, wildlife conservation and mental illness. Our innovation, JJAIBOT is an artificial intelligence bot created by Julian Jewel Jeyaraj, uses advanced algorithms to recognize images and text to detect human emotions such as anger, joy, happiness, etc. 

The components of JJAIBOT include, 1) the Artificial Intelligence based Chatbot (C-BOT) which is a transactional, conversation-based Chatbot that uses Natural Language Understanding (NLU), Natural Language Processing (NLP) and Natural Language Generation (NLG) techniques; 2) Visual & Acoustic Recognition Component (V-ARC) which uses AI and deep learning software to detect images (brain scans, facial expressions, etc.) in still or video images; 3) Emotional Processing Unit (EMU) which creates a stimuli that creates waves in the EMU that interact with each other that results in the emotional state of the AI; 4) Predictive Analytics Engine (PAE), which uses automated machine learning algorithms to data sets to create predictive models.

We use technology innovations to help the world. Our primary mission is to educate youth on climate change; prevent wildlife poaching and spread awareness about mental illness. And our extended mission includes contribution towards energy and environmental security; conflict and poverty; address global imbalances; global health crisis; and prevent transnational organized crime.

The path to conservation begins when the next generation is aware of such issues through education. In developing countries, we focus on improving people’s education and awareness, helping individuals lift themselves out of hunger and extreme poverty. In the United States, we seek to ensure that all—especially those with the fewest resources—can access the opportunities they need to succeed in school and life.

RigRun helps offshore, marine, and remote worksite organisations strengthen the human factors that underpin safe and effective operations.

Designed specifically for remote and isolated workforces, RigRun supports the physical, mental, and social health of crews operating in demanding environments characterised by shift work, fatigue exposure, long rotations, and separation from family and community.

Our platform combines team-based engagement, behavioural science, and precision health approaches to strengthen key upstream Performance Influencing Factors (PIFs) linked to Human & Organisational Performance (HOP), including fatigue, morale, crew cohesion, communication, physical readiness, and psychological wellbeing.

The result is a healthier, more connected workforce, supporting safer decision-making, stronger teamwork, and improved psychological safety.

RigRun is not a generic wellness app. It is a fully managed workforce engagement and human performance solution developed specifically for high-risk operational environments.

Key value areas include:

• Strengthening leading indicators linked to safety and human performance
• Supporting fatigue risk management and workforce resilience
• Improving crew morale, camaraderie, and sense of belonging
• Supporting onboarding and integration of new personnel and green hats
• Increasing participation in healthy behaviours during rotation
• Supporting psychosocial risk management and ISO 45003 objectives
• Providing measurable workforce wellbeing and ESG reporting outcomes
• Reducing internal workload through fully managed delivery and reporting

RigRun has supported thousands of personnel globally across rigs, vessels, platforms, FPSOs, and remote energy operations, with independently evaluated outcomes developed with our academic partnerships.

As a certified B Lab B Corp, RigRun is committed to delivering measurable impact for people, operational performance, and sustainability.

normalizedCompany.name: 1 Planet Only
normalizedCompany.description:
Our purpose is to accelerate the world’s transition to sustainable procurement & supply chain.

So this platform is designed to enhance procurement team's efficiency & effectiveness, when they want to review ESG and Sustainability aspects of their suppliers.

Big corporates' procurement team needs ESG & Sustainability information about their suppliers, who may be micro, small or medium size companies.  

Procurement team face challenges in form of
1. Easy to use ESG Snapshot, so they can make judgement in 30 seconds.
2. Quick access to ESG data without password & login formalities
3. Quick access to ESG report, so they can avoid navigating websites to find the right location of the report.
4. Credibility of ESG Snapshot, so they can find out what are the credentials of the professional who has provided assessment.
5. Contact details of ESG Snapshot consultant, so they can enquire directly without wasting time on who to contact for any ambiguity or additional information.
6. Authenticity of ESG data,, which we support by providing access to ESG consultants with excellent knowledge, necessary skills and incredible integrity.

Our solution will not only meet above 6 points, but will exceed expectations by providing additional features like
1. Accessibility through QR code on mobile phone, so no need to start your laptop to make a decision.
2. Verifiability on our website, so you can avoid emails and phone calls.
3. Integration with your vendor/supplier record in your company portal/system through weblink or QR code.
4. Requesting additional 2nd party or 3rd party assessment or verification.
